ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Groentemix in wisselende verhoudingen 43% (sugar snaps, sperziebonen, groene asperge, broccoli), gegrilde aardappel 30%, gegrilde kip 12% [kip (Beter Leven keurmerk 1 ster), maismeel, dextrose, zout], kruidenboter saus 15% [water, boter (MELK) 3%, sjalot, koolzaadolie, ui, tapiocazetmeel, zout, citroensap, knoflook, salie 0,3%, peterselie 0,2%, oregano 0,1%, tijm, witte peper].
